title: Backend API for POS core operations
description: Develop FastAPI backend APIs for product management (CRUD), cart operations (add, remove, update quantity), and order processing (checkout). Use PostgreSQL for data storage and Pydantic for request/response validation.
acceptance_criteria: Health endpoint `/health` returns status 'ok'
Products can be created, retrieved, updated, and deleted via API
Items can be added to, removed from, and have quantities updated in a shopping cart via API
A checkout API successfully processes a cart into an order, storing order details and line items
All API endpoints validate input data and return structured responses

title: Frontend POS interface for product and cart management
description: Build a React TypeScript frontend UI for displaying products, allowing users to add/remove items to a shopping cart, adjust quantities, and complete the checkout process. Integrate with the backend APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Product list is displayed on the main screen, fetched from the backend
Users can add products to a cart, and the cart UI updates in real-time
Users can adjust quantities of items in the cart and remove items
A checkout button initiates the order processing flow via the backend API
Frontend handles API responses and displays appropriate success/error messages

title: Automated testing and Dockerized deployment setup
description: Set up automated unit and integration tests for both frontend (Jest) and backend (Pytest). Create Dockerfiles and a Docker Compose configuration for local development and deployment. Configure GitHub Actions for CI/CD.
acceptance_criteria: Docker Compose successfully builds and runs both frontend and backend services locally
Backend unit and integration tests pass with Pytest
Frontend unit and integration tests pass with Jest
A GitHub Actions workflow is configured to run tests and build Docker images upon code push
Services communicate correctly within the Dockerized environment

title: Implement staff user authentication
description: Develop backend APIs for staff user registration and login, implementing token-based authentication (e.g., JWT). Integrate a basic login form into the frontend to allow staff to authenticate.
acceptance_criteria: Backend provides an API for staff registration with username/password
Backend provides an API for staff login, returning an authentication token upon success
Protected backend endpoints require a valid authentication token
Frontend includes a login page where staff can enter credentials
Frontend stores and uses the authentication token for subsequent API requests

title: Display staff order history
description: Create a backend API to retrieve a list of past orders. Develop a frontend UI page where authenticated staff can view a list of all completed orders, showing basic details like order ID, date, and total amount.
acceptance_criteria: Backend API exists to fetch a list of all past orders
The order history API is protected and requires staff authentication
Frontend includes a dedicated page/route for 'Order History'
The 'Order History' page displays a list of orders, each showing ID, date, and total
Frontend correctly fetches and renders order data from the backend API
